steps.title: Introduce the obligation
steps.content: The sentence first says collective defense gives Canada both benefits and obligations. The material after the blank explains those obligations: NATO members defend Canada, and Canada must also defend them.

steps.title: Reject weaker separators
steps.content: B uses a semicolon and drops the contrast word that links the two sides of the obligation. C uses a comma where a fuller explanatory boundary is needed. D breaks the explanation away from the summary term. The answer is A.
